task_completion.description: Locate and open the problem record 'Recurring freeze on HR Payroll System'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows an ITSM/ServiceDesk application with the problem record titled 'Recurring freeze on HR Payroll System' opened.

task_completion.description: Record the specified Root Cause in the problem record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text field or section for 'Root Cause' contains the text mentioning 'Deadlock detected', 'Weekly_Audit_Report', and 'Employee_Records'.

task_completion.description: Record the specified Symptoms in the problem record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text field or section for 'Symptoms' contains the text mentioning '500 Internal Server Error' and 'SQLSTATE 40001'.

task_completion.description: Record the specified Workaround in the problem record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text field or section for 'Workaround' contains the text mentioning 'Restart', 'PayrollService', 'VM-HR-01', and '02:00 AM'.

task_completion.description: Save the updates to the problem record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message indicating the record was saved, or the view returns to a read-only state showing the newly added Root Cause, Symptoms, and Workaround.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual ITSM/ServiceDesk GUI application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser or dedicated application interface for managing problem records, not a generic text editor (like Notepad) or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands (e.g., curl) to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text entry and saving process should be visible in the graphical user interface, without terminal windows showing API calls to update the ticket.

integrity.description: The agent actually inputted the text into the appropriate fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text is visible inside the specific input fields (Root Cause, Symptoms, Workaround) of the application form before or after saving.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target problem record is titled 'Recurring freeze on HR Payroll System'. To verify correctness, check that the Root Cause field contains the keywords 'Deadlock detected', 'Weekly_Audit_Report', and 'Employee_Records'. The Symptoms field must contain '500 Internal Server Error' and 'SQLSTATE 40001'. The Workaround field must contain 'Restart', 'PayrollService', 'VM-HR-01', and '02:00 AM'.
